summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Email Control System - both backend APIs and frontend UI are working correctly with minor UI interaction issues

ui_bugs.issue: AI submit button has overlay interception preventing clicks

Email endpoints - get all, filtering, stats, individual (6/6)
AI endpoints - chat, summarize, draft replies (7/7)
Frontend auth page loading and design
Overview page with stats cards and priority items
Messages page navigation and email list
Email detail view with priority explanations
Email filtering (All, Priority, Follow-up, Info, Attachments)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix AI submit button overlay issue on overview page - button is not clickable due to element interception
